source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/1. DHF/29. 개발완료 보고서/CYAN PROJECT 개발완료보고_260527.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: CYAN Detector development completion report covering production transfer, DHF/DMR documentation, product specifications, quality verification, and regulatory certification plans.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports internal design history and production transfer review, including MFDS domestic certification status and planned FDA 510(k), CE MDR, and EU environmental compliance activities.
keyPoints: CYAN development purpose is internal development of an ultra-low-cost wired detector.
GT1717C and GT1717CP are listed with detector specifications including a-Si TFT sensor, CsI scintillator, 140 μm pixel pitch, PoE Gigabit Ethernet communication, and AED/Line trigger modes.
DHF, DMR, AQP704, AQP707, and technical documentation items are listed as production documents.
Final quality verification reports 44 Pass, 2 in progress, and 1 Fail among 47 X-Ray Quality Evaluation items.
Domestic MFDS certification is in progress through May 2026, with FDA 510(k) and CE MDR activities planned for September and November 2026 respectively for G series 8 types plus CYAN 2 types.

evidence.claim: The document is titled CYAN Project development completion report and dated 2026.05.27.
evidence.evidenceText: CYAN Project 개발 완료 보고 일자 - 2026. 05. 27 부서 - DR 개발팀

evidence.claim: The CYAN project development purpose is internal development of an ultra-low-cost wired detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Project CYAN 개발 목적 초저가형 유선 Detector 내재화

evidence.claim: The planned development period was 2025.04.01 to 2025.12.31, while actual development ran from 2025.04.01 to 2026.05.30.
The listed CYAN detector models are GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: 모델 GT1717C GT1717CP

evidence.claim: GT1717C and GT1717CP use an a-Si TFT sensor, CsI scintillator, 140 μm pixel pitch, and 3072 x 3072 effective pixels.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector name GT1717C GT1717CP Sensor Type a-Si TFT Scintillator CsI Pixel Pitch 140μ m Effective Pixel Number 3072 x 3072 pixels

evidence.claim: The detector communication interface is 1 Gigabit Ethernet via PoE.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE (Power over Ethernet)

evidence.claim: The detector trigger modes are AED and Line manual trigger.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode AED(Automatic Exposure Detection) Line(Manual) Trigger

evidence.claim: Production documentation includes 80 completed documents across AQP704, AQP707, DMR, DHF, and technical documentation categories.

The DHF set includes a Safety EMC Test Report, Clinical Evaluation Report, Software Validation Report, risk management report, usability engineering report, PP completion report, production transfer handover document, and development completion report.
evidence.evidenceText: DHF (29 건 ) ... Safety EMC Test Report Clinical Evaluation Report 성능 검증 데이터 Software Validation Report 위험관리 보고서 사용적합성 엔지니어링 보고서 PP 완료 보고서 양산이관 인수인계서 ... 개발완료 보고서

evidence.claim: Final quality verification for Cyan Detector reported 44 pass, 2 in progress, and 1 fail out of 47 X-Ray Quality Evaluation items.
evidence.evidenceText: Cyan Detector X-Ray Quality_Evaluation - 결과 : 총 47 개 항목 중 Pass 44 건 , 진행 중 2 건 , Fail 1 건

evidence.claim: The failed quality evaluation item was unimplemented Manual Mode, with improvement planned after production transfer by agreement of related departments.
evidence.evidenceText: Fail (1 건 ) 내용 : Manual Mode 기능 미구현 · 조치 계획 : Manual Mode 기능 미구현 건에 대하여 유관부서 간 영향도를 검토 결과 양산 이관 후 개선을 진행 하는 방향으로 최종 협의 완료

evidence.claim: Electrical safety tests including power input, dielectric strength, protective earth resistance, leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current were marked PASS for GT1717C.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrical Safety Test ... Power Input Test ... PASS ... Dielectric Strength Test ... PASS ... Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test ... PASS ... Earth Leakage Current Test ... PASS ... Touch Current Test ... PASS ... Patient Leakage Current Test ... PASS

evidence.claim: Environmental tests listed high temperature/high humidity storage, low temperature storage, high temperature storage, and thermal shock with PASS results on slide 17.
evidence.evidenceText: 환경 시험 시험 항목 ... 고온고습저장시험 60 ℃, 80 % / 256 hr ... PASS 저온저장시험 -20 ℃ / 48 hr ... PASS 고온저장시험 70 ℃ / 48 hr ... PASS 열 충격시험 -10℃ ⇔ 45℃/90% (3 Cycle) ... PASS

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC and GT1717C detector characteristic comparison concluded GT1717C MTF/DQE characteristics were slightly better.
evidence.evidenceText: 검증 내용 : HAD1717MC / GT1717C Detector 특성 비교 ... 결과 : HAD1717MC 대비 MTF/DQE 특성이 조금 더 우수 한 것으로 확인

evidence.claim: For Retrofit plus CYAN 2 types, domestic MFDS certification was in progress through May 2026, with FDA 510(k) and CE MDR marked absent.
evidence.evidenceText: Retrofit + CYAN 2 종 진행중 (~ 26 년 5 월 ) - -

evidence.claim: For G series 8 types plus CYAN 2 detector-only configuration, MFDS was in progress through May 2026, FDA 510(k) planned through September 2026, and CE MDR planned through November 2026.
evidence.evidenceText: G series 8 종 + CYAN 2 종 ( 디텍터 단독 ) 진행중 (~ 26 년 5 월 ) 진행예정 (~ 26 년 9 월 ) 진행예정 (~ 26 년 11 월 )

evidence.claim: FDA 510(k) Pre-submission was planned to proceed first.
evidence.evidenceText: FDA 510(k) – Pre-submission 선진행 예정 .

evidence.claim: CE MDR proceeding status was planned for reconfirmation during June.
evidence.evidenceText: CE MDR - 6 월 중 진행여부 재확인 예정 .

evidence.claim: Medical Safety standards IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD2:2020 and IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020 Ed.3.2 with CB were marked applied complete.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Safety (IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD2:2020, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020, Ed.3.2, CB ) 적용 완료

evidence.claim: Medical EMC standard IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 Ed.4.1 with KOLAS was marked applied complete.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical EMC (IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020, Ed.4.1, KOLAS ) 적용 완료

evidence.claim: KC and FCC were marked not applicable, and NRTL was not proceeded with unless later requested by buyers.
evidence.evidenceText: 국내 KC 해당사항 없음 . 미국 NRTL 미진행 ( 추후 바이어 요구시 반영 ) FCC 해당사항 없음 .

evidence.claim: RoHS 3, REACH, and WEEE were listed for DoC self-declaration, and PPWR was planned for application.
evidence.evidenceText: RoHS 3 (Directive 2011/65/EU) / REACH ( Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 ) / WEEE ( Directive 2012/19/EU ) DoC ( 자가적합선언 ) PPWR ( Regulation (EU) 2025/40 ) 적용 예정 .

reviewFlags.reason: Revision or version metadata is not present in the source text.
Document date is mostly shown as 2026.05.27, but one CX review slide shows 작성일 26.05.28.

Environmental test duration/status evidence is potentially conflicting: slide 17 lists low/high temperature storage as 48 hr PASS, while slide 26 lists 24 hr criteria and high temperature storage as 진행 中.
Authority signal is MFDS/domestic, but the source also lists FDA 510(k), CE MDR, KC, NRTL, FCC, and EU environmental regulations.
Preprocessed slide text contains OCR/extraction artifacts such as 'Safety Tset', 'Fass/Fail', spacing errors, and malformed currency/arrow symbols.
